/usr/bin/ar qc libMCOM.a CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/BufferBidirectional.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/BufferCircular.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/Channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ChannelCurrentLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ChannelModem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ChannelModemCallback.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ChannelOpticalProbe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ChannelSerialPort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ChannelSocket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ChannelSocketBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ChannelSocketCallback.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ChannelSocketUdp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ChannelSocketUdpCallback.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/CommunicationCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/IdentifyString.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/LogFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/LogFileReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/LogFileWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/MCOMDefs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/MCOMExceptions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/MCOMExtern.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/MCOMFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/MCOMObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/Monitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/MonitorFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/MonitorFilePrivateThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/MonitorSocket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/MonitorSyslog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/Protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ProtocolC12.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ProtocolC1218.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ProtocolC1221.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ProtocolC1222.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/ProtocolThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCOM.dir/SessionKeeper.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libMCOM.a
